title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just earbuds
scenario: 1-step DFU: User can trigger firmware update for just the earbuds (not the charging case) when both have an update available
steps: Start app with Osprey earbuds and charging case both on at least version 5039 with an update available for both.
Navigate to Settings/Update and click the update button.
Click the Update button for earbuds/Voyager Free 60+ UC.
expected: Only the earbuds DFU finishes successfully; the charging case stays on the lower version.
